items.definition_en: An inhaler is a device for breathing in medicine for lung problems.
items.example_en: She always carries her inhaler in case of an asthma attack.

items.definition_en: An IV drip is a system for giving fluids or medicines through a vein.
items.example_en: The nurse set up an IV drip for the patient.

items.definition_en: A blood pressure monitor is a device used to measure blood pressure.
items.example_en: The doctor used a blood pressure monitor during the check-up.

items.definition_en: A wheelchair is a chair with wheels for people who cannot walk.
items.example_en: He needs a wheelchair after his surgery.

items.definition_en: A defibrillator is a device that can restart a stopped heart using electric shocks.
items.example_en: The hospital has a defibrillator in every hallway.

items.definition_en: A saline solution is a liquid with salt used for cleaning or medical purposes.
items.example_en: The nurse cleaned the wound with saline solution.

items.definition_en: A scalpel is a very sharp knife used by doctors in surgery.
items.example_en: The surgeon carefully used the scalpel.

items.definition_en: Allergy medicine is a drug that helps reduce allergy symptoms.
items.example_en: I need to take my allergy medicine every spring.

items.definition_en: A hearing aid is a small device that helps people hear better.
items.example_en: My grandfather wears his hearing aid all day.

items.definition_en: A blood test is a medical check that uses a sample of blood.
items.example_en: The doctor ordered a blood test to check for infection.

items.definition_en: A stethoscope is a tool doctors use to listen to the heart and lungs.
items.example_en: The doctor put his stethoscope on my chest.

items.definition_en: A surgical mask is a mask worn to stop the spread of germs during medical procedures.
items.example_en: Everyone must wear a surgical mask in the operating room.

items.definition_en: A patient chart is a record of a person's medical history and treatment.
items.example_en: The nurse updated the patient chart after the checkup.

items.definition_en: A splint is a device used to keep a body part still after an injury.
items.example_en: They put a splint on his broken finger.

items.definition_en: An epipen is a device for quickly giving a dose of medicine for severe allergic reactions.
items.example_en: He carries an epipen because he is allergic to peanuts.

items.definition_en: A surgical glove is a thin glove worn by doctors during operations to keep things clean.
items.example_en: The doctor put on surgical gloves before the operation.

items.definition_en: Medical adhesive tape is special tape used to hold bandages in place.
items.example_en: She used medical adhesive tape to fix the gauze.

items.definition_en: A hearing test is a medical check to see how well you hear sounds.
items.example_en: He had a hearing test after noticing hearing loss.

items.definition_en: Eye drops are liquid medicine used to treat eye problems.
items.example_en: The doctor gave me eye drops for my infection.

items.definition_en: A walking frame is a metal structure used to help people walk safely.
items.example_en: She uses a walking frame after her hip surgery.
